mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_clock (user_id, clock_date, clock_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{clockDate}, #{clockTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_clock WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM user_clock WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY clock_date DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT DATE(clock_date) as date, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as count FROM user_clock WHERE clock_date >= #{startDate} AND clock_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(clock_date) ORDER BY date ASC
